_doc: R76 Layer G — dia 2022/23 outlier. NO WRITE APPLIED. These 7 are the HIGHEST-CONFIDENCE slice of the sweep's wrong-asset class. The dia export waits for the one complete pass, not a half-correction. Project: Dialysis_DB (zqzrriwuavgrquhisnoa).
status: scoped_not_written — the standalone 7-deal write is SUPERSEDED by the complete sweep below

sweep_scope_2026_06_11._note: Read-only survey of the 3,037 dia market-metric sales. The sweep must dispose ALL of these classes under one taxonomy before the dia export is refreshed.

wrong_asset_class._the_7_below: are the highest-confidence, highest-$ members of this class

phantom_duplicate_sales._todo: exact key finds 0 — phantom dups arrive via multi-source ingest with SLIGHTLY DIFFERENT prices, so the sweep needs a looser definition (same property_id + sale_date within a window, or same normalized address+date). Define + quantify in the sweep pass.

fresenius._todo: 1,506 (~half the book) — NOT all wrong. The specific Fresenius distortion Scott means must be defined (e.g. a bulk/portfolio transaction split across clinics, or a mis-tag) before any exclusion. Do NOT blanket-exclude.

wrong_asset_high_confidence_7.evidence: Retail-center property type, address RANGE (multi-building), $4,285/sf is impossible for a single 13k-sf clinic — a whole multi-tenant center price mis-attached to one parcel; not a single-clinic NNN dialysis comp.
$50M Healthcare with NO dialysis tenant, no operator, no building size — no evidence this is a single dialysis clinic; portfolio/campus-scale unconfirmed.
Real DaVita tenant BUT $3,466/sf on a 10.5k-sf clinic is physically impossible (~5-10x a normal clinic $/sf) — the $36.5M is a portfolio/multi-asset price mis-attached to a single clinic parcel.

wrong_asset_high_confidence_7.addr: 1052-1090 Old Des Peres Rd, Des Peres MO
wrong_asset_high_confidence_7.evidence: Tenant 'Mens Medical Institute' is NOT dialysis; address RANGE (multi-building); $5,160/sf impossible — non-dialysis and/or whole-center.
98,136-sf RETAIL property at $368/sf = a whole retail center, not a single dialysis clinic; no dialysis tenant.

wrong_asset_high_confidence_7.addr: 501 N State Rd 7, Royal Palm Beach FL
wrong_asset_high_confidence_7.evidence: Real DaVita tenant BUT $4,734/sf on a 7.2k-sf clinic is impossible — $34M is a portfolio/multi-asset price mis-attached to a single clinic parcel.

wrong_asset_seattle_per_scott.evidence: GENUINE dialysis (Northwest Kidney Centers' Broadway flagship), but a $42.5M office/HQ building — non-representative for single-clinic NNN comps. Scott (2026-06-11): exclude with reason whole_building_hq.

before_after_note: Before/after on the affected dia chart (avg-deal-size / TTM-volume around 2022/23) will be captured at commit time for the COMPLETE sweep verdict set, not this 7-row slice.
next: Build the COMPLETE dia sweep (wrong-asset 61+29 deal-by-deal incl. these 7+Seattle; phantom-dups under a looser definition; the specific Fresenius distortion) as ONE frozen-review dry-run with a single reason taxonomy -> Scott's independent gate -> flag write -> recapture before/after. Do NOT write the 7 alone.
